Yard Maintenance

Lawn Care Plans & Services

Keep your property immaculate with our flexible service schedules. Call or text us directly to get on our route!

Most Popular

Yearly Service Plan

Designed specifically for optimal grass growth cycles in Florida weather.

May – October: Weekly Visits
November – April: Bi-Weekly Visits
  • Lawn Mowing & Height Adjustment
  • Perimeter & Driveway Edging
  • Detailed String Trimming / Weed Eating
  • Hard Surface Debris Blower Cleanup
Call (727) 453-2226 to Start

Bi-Weekly Plan

Consistent maintenance every two weeks all year long.

Year-Round: Every 2 Weeks
  • Full Lawn Cut & Precision Trim
  • Clean Edging Along Sidewalks & Curb
  • Weed Eating Around Obstacles & Fences
  • Blower Cleanup for Porches & Driveway
Call (727) 453-2226 to Start

Mowing

Precision grass cutting ensuring a clean, uniform, and healthy lawn landscape.

Edging

Sharp, defined lines along sidewalks, driveways, and garden perimeters.

Weed Eating

Managing weeds and trimming tight spots around fences, trees, and obstacles.

Blowing

Thorough clearing of clippings off driveways, walkways, patios, and decks.

Additional Landscaping & Yard Services

Plant Replacement
Mulching & Rocking
Flowerbed Overhauls
Shrub Trimming
Yard Cleanups
Leaf Removal
Yard Debris Clearing
Property Overhauls
Dump Trailers & Junk Hauling

Trailer Rentals & Junk Hauling

Rent a dump trailer to load yourself or have our Pinellas crew haul it all away for you.

Dump Trailer Rental

Rent our heavy-duty dump trailers on flexible terms: Daily, Weekly, or Monthly. Ideal for construction, roofers, and large DIY projects.

Call to Book Rental

Drop Off & Haul Away

We deliver the dump trailer directly to your driveway. You load it at your own speed. When ready, give us a call and we haul it straight away.

Arrange Drop Off

Full Service Hauling

Don't want to carry heavy junk? Our team comes out, loads up all furniture, debris, or trash, and cleans up the area. Same-day service available!

Call for Full Service

What We Haul Away

Apart from toxic chemicals, we handle and dispose of almost anything.

Furniture & Mattresses
Appliances & Electronics
Construction Debris
Yard Waste & Branches
Hot Tubs & Sheds
Foreclosure Cleanouts
Garage & Attic Cleanouts
General Junk & Scrap
